name: PMJDY
target_description: Every unbanked Indian citizen aged 10 and above
ministry: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance
data_source: PMJDY scheme features from pmjdy.gov.in + life cover guidelines

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 10 years old
Aadhaar or any govt ID required. Small account possible with self-declaration if no ID.
rules.ambiguity_note: Aadhaar is the primary ID but any government-issued identity document is acceptable; small accounts allowed even without ID via self-declaration

benefit_summary: Zero-balance bank account + RuPay debit card (₹1 lakh accidental cover) + overdraft up to ₹10,000 + life cover ₹30,000 (for eligible accounts opened in initial period)

application_offices.find_instruction: Any scheduled commercial bank (SBI, PNB, Bank of Baroda, etc.)
